name: explain-panel-skills
description: Marketplace for the ExplainPanel skills — generate accordion documentation panels from any codebase.

plugins.name: docpanel
plugins.description: Two Claude Code skills (/explore-pipeline + /explain-panel) that generate a beautiful accordion documentation component from any codebase — TSX (React/Next.js), Vue SFC (Vue/Nuxt), or a self-contained HTML file (auto-fallback for backend-only projects, zero runtime deps).
